ability1.name: Pulse Pistols
ability1.description: Tracer's short-range automatic weapons that rapidly fire bullets at enemies.

ability2.name: Blink
ability2.description: Teleports Tracer a short distance in the direction she is moving.

ability3.name: Recall
ability3.description: Returns Tracer to her previous position, health, and ammo from a few seconds earlier.

ability4.name: Pulse Bomb
ability4.description: Throws a powerful sticky explosive that detonates after a short delay.

ability1.name: Rocket Hammer
ability1.description: Reinhardt's massive melee weapon that deals heavy damage in a wide arc.

ability2.name: Barrier Field
ability2.description: Creates a large energy shield that protects Reinhardt and his allies from incoming damage.

ability3.name: Charge
ability3.description: Reinhardt charges forward, carrying enemies with him and smashing them into walls.

ability4.name: Fire Strike
ability4.description: Launches a fiery projectile that passes through enemies and deals damage.

ability5.name: Earthshatter
ability5.description: Slams the ground with the rocket hammer, knocking down enemies in front of Reinhardt.

ability1.name: Caduceus Staff
ability1.description: Mercy's staff can heal an ally or boost the damage they deal.

ability2.name: Caduceus Blaster
ability2.description: A sidearm weapon that fires projectiles to damage enemies.

ability3.name: Guardian Angel
ability3.description: Mercy flies toward a targeted ally, allowing her to quickly reposition.

ability4.name: Resurrect
ability4.description: Revives a nearby fallen teammate after a short cast time.

ability5.name: Angelic Descent
ability5.description: Allows Mercy to slow her fall while airborne.

ability6.name: Valkyrie
ability6.description: Allows Mercy to fly freely and enhances her staff, blaster, and mobility.

ability1.name: Shuriken
ability1.description: Genji throws precise shuriken projectiles, either in a straight line or in a spread.

ability2.name: Deflect
ability2.description: Deflects incoming projectiles back toward enemies and blocks melee attacks.

ability3.name: Swift Strike
ability3.description: Genji dashes forward, damaging enemies in his path. Eliminations reset the cooldown.

ability4.name: Cyber-Agility
ability4.description: Allows Genji to climb walls and perform a double jump.

ability5.name: Dragonblade
ability5.description: Genji draws his blade for a short time, dealing powerful melee damage.

ability1.name: Tesla Cannon
ability1.description: Winston's weapon fires short-range electricity that damages enemies in front of him.

ability2.name: Jump Pack
ability2.description: Winston leaps through the air and damages enemies when he lands.

ability3.name: Barrier Projector
ability3.description: Deploys a protective dome-shaped barrier that blocks enemy attacks.

ability4.name: Primal Rage
ability4.description: Winston gains a large amount of health, enhanced jumping, and powerful knockback melee attacks.

ability1.name: Biotic Rifle
ability1.description: Ana's rifle heals allies and damages enemies from long range.

ability2.name: Sleep Dart
ability2.description: Fires a dart that puts an enemy to sleep for a short time.

ability3.name: Biotic Grenade
ability3.description: Throws a grenade that heals allies, increases healing received, damages enemies, and prevents enemy healing.

ability4.name: Nano Boost
ability4.description: Empowers an ally, increasing their damage and reducing the damage they take.

ability1.name: Heavy Pulse Rifle
ability1.description: Soldier: 76's automatic rifle that deals reliable damage at medium range.

ability2.name: Helix Rockets
ability2.description: Launches explosive rockets that deal burst damage to enemies.

ability3.name: Sprint
ability3.description: Allows Soldier: 76 to run faster while moving forward.

ability4.name: Biotic Field
ability4.description: Deploys a healing field that restores health to Soldier: 76 and nearby allies.

ability5.name: Tactical Visor
ability5.description: Locks Soldier: 76's aim onto enemies in view for a short time.

ability1.name: Fusion Cannons
ability1.description: D.Va's mech weapons fire continuous short-range shots.

ability2.name: Light Gun
ability2.description: D.Va's pilot weapon used when she is outside of her mech.

ability3.name: Boosters
ability3.description: Launches D.Va's mech forward, allowing her to fly and knock back enemies.

ability4.name: Defense Matrix
ability4.description: Projects a defensive field that destroys incoming projectiles.

ability5.name: Micro Missiles
ability5.description: Fires a volley of explosive missiles at enemies.

ability6.name: Eject!
ability6.description: D.Va ejects from her mech when it is destroyed.

ability7.name: Self-Destruct
ability7.description: D.Va ejects and overloads her mech, causing a large explosion.

ability8.name: Call Mech
ability8.description: Calls down a new mech, damaging enemies near the landing area.

ability1.name: Healing Ofuda
ability1.description: Kiriko sends healing talismans that seek targeted allies.

ability2.name: Kunai
ability2.description: Throws a kunai projectile that deals increased critical damage.

ability3.name: Swift Step
ability3.description: Teleports Kiriko directly to an ally, even through walls.

ability4.name: Protection Suzu
ability4.description: Throws a charm that briefly protects allies and cleanses negative effects.

ability5.name: Wall Climb
ability5.description: Allows Kiriko to climb walls by jumping toward them.

ability6.name: Kitsune Rush
ability6.description: Summons a fox spirit path that increases allies' movement speed, attack speed, and cooldown recovery.

ability1.name: Hellfire Shotguns
ability1.description: Reaper's twin shotguns deal heavy damage at close range.

ability2.name: The Reaping
ability2.description: Reaper heals himself for a portion of the damage he deals.

ability3.name: Dire Triggers
ability3.description: Fires a longer-range accurate volley from both Hellfire Shotguns.

ability4.name: Wraith Form
ability4.description: Reaper becomes invulnerable and moves faster, but cannot shoot.

ability5.name: Shadow Step
ability5.description: Teleports Reaper to a targeted location after a short cast time.

ability6.name: Death Blossom
ability6.description: Reaper spins and fires both shotguns, damaging all nearby enemies.

ability1.name: Hyperspheres
ability1.description: Sigma launches two gravitic charges that bounce and explode after a short duration.

ability2.name: Experimental Barrier
ability2.description: Sends out a floating barrier that Sigma can stop and recall.

ability3.name: Kinetic Grasp
ability3.description: Absorbs incoming projectiles and converts part of the damage into shields.

ability4.name: Accretion

ability5.name: Gravitic Flux
ability5.description: Lifts enemies into the air and slams them back down, dealing damage.

ability1.name: Orb of Destruction
ability1.description: Zenyatta fires energy orbs individually or charges multiple orbs to release at once.

ability2.name: Orb of Harmony
ability2.description: Places a healing orb on an ally that restores health over time.

ability3.name: Orb of Discord
ability3.description: Places an orb on an enemy, causing them to take increased damage.

ability4.name: Snap Kick
ability4.description: Zenyatta's quick melee deals increased damage and knocks enemies back.

ability5.name: Transcendence
ability5.description: Zenyatta becomes invulnerable and rapidly heals nearby allies.

ability1.name: Sonic Amplifier
ability1.description: Lúcio's primary weapon, a sonic blaster that fires projectiles at enemies.

ability2.name: Crossfade
ability2.description: Switches between two songs: Healing Boost heals nearby allies, and Speed Boost makes nearby allies move faster.

ability3.name: Amp It Up
ability3.description: Increases the effectiveness of Lúcio's healing and speed songs.

ability4.name: Wall Ride
ability4.description: Allows Lúcio to ride along walls, gaining increased mobility and the ability to reach higher ground.

ability5.name: Sound Barrier
ability5.description: Creates a temporary shield that absorbs damage for nearby allies.

ability1.name: Mediblaster
ability1.description: Juno's burst-fire weapon heals allies and damages enemies.

ability2.name: Pulsar Torpedoes
ability2.description: Locks onto allies and enemies, healing allies and damaging enemies with homing projectiles.

ability3.name: Glide Boost
ability3.description: Boosts Juno's horizontal movement, allowing her to glide quickly through the air.

ability4.name: Hyper Ring
ability4.description: Deploys a ring that increases movement speed for allies who pass through it.

ability5.name: Martian Overboots
ability5.description: Allows Juno to double jump and hover in the air for extra mobility.

ability6.name: Orbital Ray
ability6.description: Calls down a moving beam that heals allies and increases their damage.

ability1.name: Berserker
ability1.description: Mauga gains temporary health when dealing critical damage.

ability2.name: Incendiary Chaingun
ability2.description: An automatic chaingun that ignites enemies after repeated hits.

ability3.name: Volatile Chaingun

ability4.name: Overrun
ability4.description: Mauga charges forward, knocking enemies back and stomping at the end of the charge.

ability5.name: Cardiac Overdrive
ability5.description: Nearby allies take reduced damage and heal by dealing damage.

ability6.name: Cage Fight
ability6.description: Traps nearby enemies in a cylindrical barrier and gives Mauga unlimited ammo for a short time.

ability1.name: Augmented Fusion Driver
ability1.description: Orisa's heat-based automatic weapon deals sustained damage at medium range.

ability2.name: Energy Javelin

ability3.name: Fortify

ability4.name: Javelin Spin
ability4.description: Spins the javelin to destroy projectiles, push enemies, and move forward faster.

ability5.name: Terra Surge
ability5.description: Pulls in nearby enemies and charges a powerful area attack.

ability1.name: Scrap Gun
ability1.description: Roadhog's short-range shotgun fires powerful scrap bursts.

ability2.name: Chain Hook

ability3.name: Take a Breather
ability3.description: Roadhog heals himself and reduces incoming damage for a short time.

ability4.name: Pig Pen
ability4.description: Places a trap that slows and damages enemies when triggered.

ability5.name: Whole Hog
ability5.description: Fires a continuous stream of scrap that damages and knocks enemies back.

ability1.name: Particle Cannon
ability1.description: Zarya's weapon fires a short-range beam or explosive energy charges.

ability2.name: Energy
ability2.description: Damage blocked by Zarya's barriers increases her weapon damage.

ability3.name: Particle Barrier
ability3.description: Creates a barrier around Zarya that absorbs damage and builds energy.

ability4.name: Projected Barrier
ability4.description: Creates a barrier around an ally that absorbs damage and builds energy.

ability5.name: Graviton Surge

ability1.name: Hand Cannon

ability2.name: Rocket Punch

ability2.name: Jagged Wall

ability4.name: Violent Leap

ability5.name: Vault

ability1.description: Wrecking Ball's automatic mech weapons deal sustained damage.

ability2.name: Roll

ability3.name: Grappling Claw

ability6.name: Minefield
ability6.description: Deploys a large field of proximity mines.

ability1.description: Domina restores shields when damaging enemies with abilities.

ability2.name: Photon Magnum
ability2.description: Fires a medium-range hard-light beam that ends with a high-impact shot.

ability3.name: Barrier Array

ability4.name: Sonic Repulsors

ability5.name: Crystal Charge

ability5.description: Launches a powerful water blast that affects targets in an area.

ability1.name: Biotic Launcher
ability1.description: Baptiste's weapon fires burst shots and healing grenades.

ability2.name: Regenerative Burst
ability2.description: Heals Baptiste and nearby allies over time.

ability3.name: Immortality Field
ability3.description: Deploys a device that prevents allies inside from dying.

ability4.name: Exo Boots
ability4.description: Crouches to charge a higher jump.

ability5.name: Amplification Matrix
ability5.description: Creates a matrix that doubles allied projectile damage and healing passing through it.

ability1.name: Jetpack
ability1.description: Allows Jetpack Cat to stay in permanent flight.

ability2.name: Biotic Pawjectiles
ability2.description: Fires projectiles that heal allies and damage enemies.

ability3.name: Frenetic Flight
ability3.description: Boosts Jetpack Cat's aerial movement speed.

ability4.name: Lifeline
ability4.description: Connects to an ally to support or reposition around them.

ability5.name: Purr
ability5.description: Provides healing or support to nearby allies.

ability6.name: Catnapper
ability6.description: Uses a special projectile or area effect to disrupt enemies.
